features.name: timing constraint on incompletely specified cell ports
features.description: Code should include an FPGA primitive cell instantiation with missing or partially specified port connections, where those ports have $setup timing constraints
features.snippet:
RAMB36E1 ram(.WEA(we), .DOADO(o2));
// WEA is 4-bit port but only 1-bit we connected, other ports unspecified

features.name: cell port access without bounds checking
features.description: Code should include a cell port accessed at an offset that may exceed the port width, without first checking if the offset is within bounds
